'''鈭歽-r-s''' ('''yarasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quart|quart]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quart|quart]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-r-s
|-
! Lemma
| yarasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yarasithi|yarasithi]] || [[word:yarasiji|yarasiji]] || [[word:yarasishi|yarasishi]] || [[word:yarasi|yarasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yarasuthuth|yarasuthuth]] || [[word:yarasujuj|yarasujuj]] || [[word:yarasushush|yarasushush]] || [[word:yaras|yaras]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yarasuthu|yarasuthu]] || [[word:yarasuju|yarasuju]] || [[word:yarasushu|yarasushu]] || [[word:yarasu|yarasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yarasufuth|yarasufuth]] || [[word:yarasufuj|yarasufuj]] || [[word:yarasufush|yarasufush]] || [[word:yarasuf|yarasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yarasethe|yarasethe]] || [[word:yaraseje|yaraseje]] || [[word:yaraseshe|yaraseshe]] || [[word:yarase|yarase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yarasothoth|yarasothoth]] || [[word:yarasojoj|yarasojoj]] || [[word:yarasoshosh|yarasoshosh]] || [[word:yaras|yaras]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yarasotho|yarasotho]] || [[word:yarasojo|yarasojo]] || [[word:yarasosho|yarasosho]] || [[word:yaraso|yaraso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yarasofoth|yarasofoth]] || [[word:yarasofoj|yarasofoj]] || [[word:yarasofosh|yarasofosh]] || [[word:yarasof|yarasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yaras忙th忙|yaras忙th忙]] || [[word:yaras忙j忙|yaras忙j忙]] || [[word:yaras忙sh忙|yaras忙sh忙]] || [[word:yaras忙|yaras忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yarasathath|yarasathath]] || [[word:yarasajaj|yarasajaj]] || [[word:yarasashash|yarasashash]] || [[word:yaras|yaras]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yarasatha|yarasatha]] || [[word:yarasaja|yarasaja]] || [[word:yarasasha|yarasasha]] || [[word:yarasa|yarasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yarasafath|yarasafath]] || [[word:yarasafaj|yarasafaj]] || [[word:yarasafash|yarasafash]] || [[word:yarasaf|yarasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yarasasha|yarasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyarasasha|goyarasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyarasasha|gokiyarasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yarasn眉sha|yarasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyarasnkn眉sha|goyarasnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyarasn眉sha|gokiyarasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yarash毛sha|yarash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyarasnksh毛sha|goyarasnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyarash毛sha|gokiyarash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yarasrosha|yarasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyarasnkrosha|goyarasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyarasrosha|gokiyarasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yarasmusha|yarasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyarasnkmusha|goyarasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyarasmusha|gokiyarasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yarasherasha|yarasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyarasnksherasha|goyarasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyarasherasha|gokiyarasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yarasngasha|yarasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyarasnkngasha|goyarasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyarasngasha|gokiyarasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yarasyasha|yarasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyarasnkyasha|goyarasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyarasyasha|gokiyarasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yarasyamasha|yarasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyarasnkyamasha|goyarasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyarasyamasha|gokiyarasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yarasn眉sh毛sha|yarasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyarasnkn眉sh毛sha|goyarasnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyarasn眉sh毛sha|gokiyarasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yarasn眉rosha|yarasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyarasnkn眉rosha|goyarasnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyarasn眉rosha|gokiyarasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yarasn眉musha|yarasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyarasnkn眉musha|goyarasnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyarasn眉musha|gokiyarasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yarash毛n眉sha|yarash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyarasnksh毛n眉sha|goyarasnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyarash毛n眉sha|gokiyarash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yarash毛rosha|yarash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyarasnksh毛rosha|goyarasnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyarash毛rosha|gokiyarash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yarash毛musha|yarash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyarasnksh毛musha|goyarasnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyarash毛musha|gokiyarash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yarasron眉sha|yarasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyarasnkron眉sha|goyarasnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyarasron眉sha|gokiyarasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yarasrosh毛sha|yarasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyarasnkrosh毛sha|goyarasnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyarasrosh毛sha|gokiyarasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yarasromusha|yarasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyarasnkromusha|goyarasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyarasromusha|gokiyarasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yarasmun眉sha|yarasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyarasnkmun眉sha|goyarasnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyarasmun眉sha|gokiyarasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yarasmush毛sha|yarasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyarasnkmush毛sha|goyarasnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyarasmush毛sha|gokiyarasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yarasmurosha|yarasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyarasnkmurosha|goyarasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyarasmurosha|gokiyarasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yaras|yaras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:y忙r忙s|y忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyaras|hoyaras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoy忙r忙s|hoy忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyaras|hohoyaras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoy忙r忙s|hohoy忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉yaras|n眉yaras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉y忙r忙s|n眉y忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉yaras|n眉n眉yaras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉y忙r忙s|n眉n眉y忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂yaras|n茂yaras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂y忙r忙s|n茂y忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂yaras|n茂n茂yaras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂y忙r忙s|n茂n茂y忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyaras|luyaras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luy忙r忙s|luy忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyaras|luluyaras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluy忙r忙s|luluy忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyaras|liyaras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liy忙r忙s|liy忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyaras|liliyaras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliy忙r忙s|liliy忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyaras|koyaras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koy忙r忙s|koy忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyaras|kokoyaras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoy忙r忙s|kokoy忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyaras|keyaras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:key忙r忙s|key忙r忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyaras|kekeyaras]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekey忙r忙s|kekey忙r忙s]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
